name: Graviola Annona muricata
summary: Graviola is safety-concerning due to annonaceous acetogenins and neurotoxicity signals; no clinical efficacy evidence supports therapeutic use.
description: Annona muricata botanical containing acetogenins (e.g., annonacin) with preclinical cytotoxicity; human efficacy is unproven and not evidence-linked to benefit.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
